parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Create User Profile

actor User
participant "API Gateway" as API
participant "Auth-Service" as Auth
participant "User-Service" as UserSvc

User -> API : POST /api/users
API -> Auth : check authorization
Auth -> API : http_status: 200
API -> UserSvc : POST /api/users
UserSvc -> API : http_status: 200
API -> User : profile created..

@enduml
```
